---
title: "Memory Card"
subtitle: "Frontend"
description: "A fun and interactive memory card game built with React, featuring dynamic card shuffling, score tracking, and Pokémon API integration."
author: Abdullah Zeeshan
date: 2024-10-21
image: ../utils/memory-card.png
categories:
  - React
  - Vite
reading-time: true
toc: true
fig-align: center
fig-cap-location: bottom
---

<span class="listing-btn-group">
<a href="https://memory-card-pi-virid.vercel.app/" class="btn" role="button">{{< fa globe >}} Live</a> 
<a href="https://github.com/4bdullah7eeshan/memory-card" class="btn" role="button">{{< iconify fa github >}} Source Code</a>
</span>

::: {.callout-note}
Project Description will be added soon.
:::
